zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu於大約1250年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特時，他的父親Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne25歲，母親Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu29歲。他和Beatrix de Châtillon至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1294年6月12日在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu于大约1250年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特时，他的父亲Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne25岁，母亲Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu29岁。他和Beatrix de Châtillon至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1294年6月12日在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu was born about 1250, in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne, was 25 and his mother, Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Beatrix de Châtillon. He died on 12 June 1294, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu est né environ 1250, à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Beatrix de Châtillon. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1294, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu um 1250 in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne 25 und seine Mutter Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu 29. Er hatte mit Beatrix de Châtillon mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1294 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu è nato il circa 1250 nel Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Beatrix de Châtillon. Morì il 12 giugno 1294, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean I de Brienne Count of Euが約1250年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントで生まれた時，父Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienneは25歳，母Marie de Lusignan Countess of Euは29歳であった。彼はBeatrix de Châtillonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1294年6月12日に故郷で45歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu(이)가 대략 1250년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Beatrix de Châtillon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년 6월 12일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Beatrix de Châtillon. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1294, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu родился около 1250 г. в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Beatrix de Châtillon. Он умер 12 июня 1294 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu nació aproximadamente 1250, en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Marie de Lusignan Countess of Eu, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Beatrix de Châtillon. Murió el 12 de junio de 1294, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
